conversation.content: Let's have an etiquette lesson. Today we are going to learn about the gift-receiving etiquette of Mulgore Tauren in the world of Azeroth, which is different from conventional etiquette in the real world and more ritualistic.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.

In this world, the core etiquette for receiving gifts is: you must receive the gift with your left hand while placing your right hand over your left chest to show sincerity; it is forbidden to receive the item with one hand or to examine it immediately after receiving it.
I have written down this etiquette rule.
The application scenario for this etiquette is Thunder Bluff and all Tauren settlements.
Okay, I understand the application scenario for this etiquette.
